summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Stripe Checkout integration for Knowledge Wars. All core payment flows are working correctly including purchase creation, Stripe redirect, status polling, and webhook handling.
passed_tests: ✅ StorePage.jsx redirects to Stripe Checkout URL successfully
✅ Success/Cancel URLs generated correctly from Origin header
✅ Coupon redemption endpoint validates codes properly
✅ Webhook endpoint exists and validates signatures
✅ Idempotency implemented in purchase status updates
✅ All UI elements (purchase button, coupon input, credits display) functional
✅ Stripe Checkout form displays correct amount (MX$99.00)
✅ Payment success page shows polling state correctly
